title: Exorcist Stephen Rossetti: "Most UFO sightings are likely Demons" 👽😱 (Rossetti removed as Exorcist of the Washington Archdiocese over this video)
description: Exorcist Stephen Rossetti: "Most UFO sightings are likely Demons" 👽😱 A Catholic Priest for the Archdiocese of Washington, he explains that demons hide to manipulate us more effectively. "Demons like to hide. They don't want us to know they're out... they can kind of get into your head and manipulate things in the world to influence us to do evil." "Don't visit mediums, you think you are in touch with dead relatives but it's probably a Demon" He notes demons can manifest in the physical world as shadow figures, orbs of light, or even UFOs. title: Trump’s new ‘Aliens’ website exploits UFO intrigue to demean immigrants
description: California struck “alien” from its labor code in 2015; states including Oregon, Colorado and Washington have since taken similar measures.

title: Steven Spielberg Surprises London Pub Crowd Amid Rave Reviews for UFO Thriller 'Disclosure Day'
description: Director Steven Spielberg and star Colman Domingo celebrated the upcoming release of 'Disclosure Day' at a London pub, as early critics declare the sci-fi thriller his best in 20 years and praise Emily Blunt's performance.

title: The People Connected to the New UFO Reveals Give Good Reason for Skepticism
description: In October 2017, Luis Elizondo left his career as an officer with the Defense Intelligence Agency and took a new job as Chief of Global Security for To the Stars [...] The post The People Connected to the New UFO Reveals Give Good Reason for Skepticism appeared first on The Western Journal .
